final:
module RefModule(
                      input [9:0] d,
                      input clk,
                      input rst,
                      input en,
                      output reg [9:0] q
                      );always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
      if(rst) q <= 0;
      else if(en) q <= d;
   end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
